features.name: DFF primitive instantiation with CLK D Q ports
features.description: Code should include a module instance of a DFF primitive with CLK, D, and Q port connections where CLK is a clock signal

features.name: module with multiple DFF instances driving register bits
features.description: Code should include a module that instantiates multiple DFF primitives each driving a different bit of a register output

features.name: standard cell library naming with double underscores
features.description: Code should include module instantiations where the module name follows standard cell library naming convention with double underscores (e.g., library__cell_name)

features.name: DFF Q output feedback to combinational next-state logic
features.description: Code should include a DFF output signal that feeds back into combinational logic which computes the D input for the next clock cycle
